name: PEPSICO INC
summary: PepsiCo is a leading global beverage and convenient food company incorporated in Delaware in 1919. It makes, markets, distributes and sells products under brands including Lays, Doritos, Cheetos, Gatorade, Pepsi-Cola, Mountain Dew, Quaker and SodaStream. Operating through six segments, PepsiCo serves customers and consumers in more than 200 countries and territories via direct-store-delivery, customer warehouse, distributor networks, and e-commerce platforms.
